title: Make a Square with the Same Color
hints: It is impossible to create 2 x 2 square with the same color by changing the color of at most one cell when the number of ‘W' or 'B’ in all squares is 2.

solutions.explanation: Check each of the four 2x2 sub-squares in the 3x3 grid; if any has ≥3 cells of the same colour it can become uniform with at most one change. O(1) time.
